content.question: Do Hungary's regional variations in SNI rates (14% in Békés county vs. 5–6% in other counties) reflect differences in underlying student population characteristics, diagnostic/administrative capacity, or policy implementation choices?
content.reduction_path: Map regional SNI rates against demographic factors (urban-rural distribution, SES, immigrant/minority population density, age structure); conduct case studies of high-variation and low-variation regions comparing diagnostic protocols, teacher training, special-education resource allocation, and municipal funding formulas; interview regional education officials about decision-making differences.
